## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and where does VoidSpark get in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Sketch the UX or the API shape if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Roadmap milestone (if known), related issues, screenshots, or links.
